{{ define "main" }} {{ with .Params.book }} {{ $book_id := .public_id }} {{ $book_data := index $.Site.Data.books $book_id }}
{{ if $book_data }} {{ with $book_data.cover_url }} {{ else }} {{ with $book_data.emoji }}{{ . }}{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ $book_data.title }}
{{ $book_data.author }}
{{ with $book_data.rating }}{{ $r := . }}
{{ range seq 1 5 }}{{ if le . $r }}★{{ else }}☆{{ end }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ else }} {{ with .emoji }}{{ . }}{{ end }}
{{ .title }}
{{ .author }}
{{ with .rating }}{{ $r := . }}
{{ range seq 1 5 }}{{ if le . $r }}★{{ else }}☆{{ end }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ .Content }}
{{ .Date | time.Format ":date_long" }}
{{ with .Params.tags }}
{{ range . }} {{ . }} {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ partial "related.html" . }} {{ end }}
